overall.description: Static first-person view from a futuristic cyberpunk high-rise apartment bedroom overlooking a foggy neon-lit cityscape at night. The scene features modern interior design with a large bed and floor-to-ceiling windows showing towering skyscrapers obscured by atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury high-rise bedroom with panoramic city view

agents.ego_description: standing still at the foot of the bed, calmly observing the foggy cyberpunk cityscape through the floor-to-ceiling windows

entered.detail: modern platform bed with white linens and pillows positioned against the window wall
tall panoramic windows spanning the exterior wall providing view of the city
dense cluster of neon-lit skyscrapers and high-rise buildings obscured by atmospheric fog
single palm tree visible through the window against the city backdrop
round metallic bedside lamp sitting on a dark nightstand
rectangular illuminated wall sconce casting warm light

segments.scene_description: A static first-person perspective from within a modern luxury bedroom in a high-rise apartment. The camera faces a large bed with white sheets positioned against floor-to-ceiling windows that reveal a foggy cyberpunk cityscape at night, complete with neon-lit skyscrapers and a silhouetted palm tree. The room features contemporary furnishings including a spherical bedside lamp and warm wall lighting, creating a contrast between the cozy interior and the hazy urban exterior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static first-person perspective within a luxury high-rise bedroom that contrasts a warm, intimate interior with a cold, neon-lit urban expanse. It begins by framing a large bed with crisp white sheets, positioned directly against expansive floor-to-ceiling windows. As the eye moves across the room, the cozy atmosphere is defined by contemporary furnishings and the soft glow of a spherical bedside lamp and warm wall lighting. The scene then opens outward through the glass to reveal a foggy cyberpunk cityscape at night, where towering skyscrapers are shrouded in atmospheric haze. Finally, the view settles on the distant, glowing neon lights of the city and the dark silhouette of a lone palm tree against the misty horizon.
